items.caption: A slide from a presentation on the topic of disease. the slide is titled "define disease" and provides a definition of disease as "abnormal condition affecting the body of an organism" which may be caused by external factors or internal dysfunctions. the slide is divided into two sections, each with a subheading. the first section is labeled "ex. limes disease" and features a close-up photograph of a person's finger with a tick attached to it. the second section is labeled "ex. celiac disease" and displays two images of a microscopic view of the intestinal lining, one showing a healthy condition and the other showing an abnormal condition, possibly indicative of celiac disease. the slide is educational in nature, aiming to illustrate the concept of disease through examples.
